onePiece.name: One Piece Vol. 1
onePiece.description: Monkey D. Luffy sets out to become King of the Pirates in this legendary adventure. After eating the Gum-Gum Devil Fruit, Luffy gains the power of rubber — and the dream of finding the legendary One Piece treasure.

naruto.name: Naruto Vol. 1
naruto.description: A young ninja dreams of becoming Hokage and earning the respect of his village. Naruto Uzumaki carries the Nine-Tailed Fox sealed within him — and a determination to prove himself to the world.

attackOnTitan.name: Attack on Titan Vol. 1
attackOnTitan.description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid Titans behind enormous walls. Eren Yeager vows revenge after witnessing the fall of Wall Maria and the devastation it brings to his family.

demonSlayer.name: Demon Slayer Vol. 1
demonSlayer.description: Tanjiro becomes a demon slayer to avenge his family and find a cure for his sister Nezuko, who has been transformed into a demon. A heartfelt story of brotherhood and perseverance.

fruitsBasket.name: Fruits Basket Vol. 1
fruitsBasket.description: Tohru Honda discovers the Sohma family secret — members are possessed by the spirits of the Chinese zodiac and transform when hugged by members of the opposite sex. A beautiful story of healing and acceptance.
